theme_notes: Drawn from the 2026 World Cup Round of 32 (Germany knocked out by Paraguay on penalties, Morocco shocking the Netherlands on PKs, France 3-0 Sweden, final at MetLife July 19) and the Supreme Court's last rulings of the term (birthright citizenship upheld against Trump's order, states can ban trans athletes, campaign-finance coordination limits struck down), plus a dangerous eastern U.S. heat wave hitting World Cup host cities.
settled: Germany got knocked out by Paraguay on penalties. Your balance is at least still standing.
